multi_image_fusion_templates.name: 多图融合模板 (风格+主体)
multi_image_fusion_templates.description: 将参考图1的风格与参考图2的主体融合，并保持参考图3的光影效果。
multi_image_fusion_templates.prompt: Merge the artistic style of @image1 with the main subject from @image2, ensuring the lighting and atmosphere are consistent with @image3. High detail, cinematic, 4k.

multi_image_fusion_templates.name: 角色一致性多图生图模板
multi_image_fusion_templates.description: 在多个场景中保持角色的面部特征和服装一致性。
multi_image_fusion_templates.prompt: Generate a series of images depicting a consistent character. The character's appearance should strictly follow @image1. Scene 1: {{scene_1_description}}. Scene 2: {{scene_2_description}}. Scene 3: {{scene_3_description}}. Maintain character consistency throughout.

precise_local_editing_templates.name: 文字引导局部修改模板
precise_local_editing_templates.description: 根据文字描述精确修改图片中的局部元素。
precise_local_editing_templates.prompt: In @image1, precisely change the {{object_to_change}} to {{new_description}}. Ensure the changes are seamless and integrate naturally with the existing image. Keep all other elements unchanged.

precise_local_editing_templates.name: 背景替换模板
precise_local_editing_templates.description: 替换图片中的背景，同时保持主体不变。
precise_local_editing_templates.prompt: Replace the background of @image1 with a {{new_background_description}}. The main subject should remain exactly as it is, perfectly integrated into the new background. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic.

complex_semantic_following_templates.name: 长文本解析生成模板 (信息图)
complex_semantic_following_templates.description: 将长文本描述转化为视觉信息图。
complex_semantic_following_templates.prompt: Create a detailed infographic based on the following text: "{{long_text_content}}". The infographic should be visually appealing, easy to understand, and accurately represent all key points from the text. Use a clean, modern design style with appropriate icons and data visualizations. 4k resolution.

complex_semantic_following_templates.name: 概念图生成模板
complex_semantic_following_templates.description: 根据复杂概念生成抽象或具象的视觉表现。
complex_semantic_following_templates.prompt: Visualize the concept of '{{complex_concept}}' in an abstract yet understandable manner. Use {{art_style}} art style, with a focus on {{key_elements}}. The image should evoke a sense of {{emotion_or_feeling}}. 4k, highly artistic.
